findings.name: first-use spreadsheet guidance
evidence: tests/e2e/batch2r-guidance.spec.js: #workspaceFirstUse absent after spreadsheet goal selection
docs/batch-2r/07-content-and-state-patterns.md: approved inline format, local-device, guide, and keyboard contract
findings.remediation: Add one semantic, spreadsheet-input-only first-use aside; no script or network change.

findings.name: representative boundary capture
evidence: strict-mode selector collision between #appShell and the manual goal button after first selection
findings.remediation: Scope the helper selector to the manual goal button and wait on existing map state for fixture captures.

findings.name: high-DPI export controls
evidence: tests/e2e/batch2r-workspace.spec.js proves #exportSection appears after #applyColorBtn; high-DPI test only selects a region
findings.remediation: Use the existing apply-color interaction and assert visible export controls before testing their target size.

findings.name: Chromium-mobile smallest PNG export

reproduction.command: npx playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --project=chromium-mobile --grep load, color, save, SVG export, and smallest PNG export --workers=1 --reporter=list --trace=on

findings.remediation: Run 10 isolated and 5 sequence executions without retries before any code or test change decision.

decision: Focused guidance product repair and boundary-test corrections are approved; no mobile PNG change is approved.
